evidence_grade.description: Ordinal evidence grade for defaults or curated source families, where grade_4 is strongest and grade_1 is heuristic.

evidence_basis.description: Whether the value was explicit input, curated default, heuristic, or derived.

default_visibility.description: Whether the assumption can remain silently traceable, must warn, or would block.

applicability_status.description: Whether the parameter is in-domain, user-asserted, or a screening extrapolation.

uncertainty_types.description: Primary uncertainty families attached to the parameter.
uncertainty_types.title: Uncertainty Types

applicability_domain.description: Structured scenario context that describes where this value is intended to apply.
applicability_domain.title: Applicability Domain

locator.description: URL, file path, or logical locator.
locator.title: Locator

version.description: Version or effective date for the source.
version.title: Version

name.description: Stable parameter name used by the engine.
name.title: Name

source_kind.description: Whether the value was user supplied, defaulted, or derived.

default_applied.description: Whether a default value was applied.
default_applied.title: Default Applied

governance.description: Scientific-governance metadata for defaulting, applicability, and uncertainty.

tier_semantics.description: Tier and interpretation-boundary semantics for the active model.

uncertaintyTier.description: Current uncertainty-governance tier for this output.

uncertaintyRegister.description: Qualitative or bounded uncertainty entries attached to the scenario.
uncertaintyRegister.title: Uncertaintyregister

sensitivityRanking.description: Deterministic one-at-a-time sensitivity ranking for the primary dose metric.
sensitivityRanking.title: Sensitivityranking

dependencyMetadata.description: Known dependence structures that matter for later uncertainty work.
dependencyMetadata.title: Dependencymetadata

validationSummary.description: Current validation posture for the route and mechanism represented.

tierUpgradeAdvisories.description: Machine-readable upgrade hooks for later tier implementations.
tierUpgradeAdvisories.title: Tierupgradeadvisories

intentionallyManufacturedParticle.description: Whether the material is an intentionally manufactured particle.
intentionallyManufacturedParticle.title: Intentionallymanufacturedparticle

insolubleOrBiopersistent.description: Whether the particle is treated as insoluble or biopersistent.
insolubleOrBiopersistent.title: Insolubleorbiopersistent

agglomerationState.description: Agglomeration or aggregation state relevant to use.

surfaceTreated.description: Whether the particle has a relevant surface treatment or coating.
surfaceTreated.title: Surfacetreated

surfaceTreatmentNotes.description: Short notes on coatings or surface treatment when known.
surfaceTreatmentNotes.title: Surfacetreatmentnotes

medianPrimaryParticleSizeNm.description: Median primary particle size in nm when known.
medianPrimaryParticleSizeNm.title: Medianprimaryparticlesizenm

sizeRangeNmLow.description: Lower particle size bound in nm.
sizeRangeNmLow.title: Sizerangenmlow

sizeRangeNmHigh.description: Upper particle size bound in nm.
sizeRangeNmHigh.title: Sizerangenmhigh

respirableFractionRelevance.description: Whether inhalation respirable-fraction context is materially relevant.
respirableFractionRelevance.title: Respirablefractionrelevance

dermalPenetrationConcern.description: Whether dermal particle penetration or retention is a relevant concern.
dermalPenetrationConcern.title: Dermalpenetrationconcern

article16NotificationRelevant.description: Whether EU cosmetics Article 16 nanomaterial notification context applies.
article16NotificationRelevant.title: Article16Notificationrelevant

echaSpmRestrictionRelevant.description: Whether EU synthetic polymer microparticle restriction/reporting context applies.
echaSpmRestrictionRelevant.title: Echaspmrestrictionrelevant

population_group.description: Population group, for example adult or child.
population_group.title: Population Group

exposed_surface_area_cm2.description: Exposed surface area for dermal scenarios.
exposed_surface_area_cm2.title: Exposed Surface Area Cm2

region.description: Regional context for defaults or interpretation.
region.title: Region

product_subtype.description: Optional narrower product-use subtype such as indoor_surface_insecticide or surface_trigger_spray_disinfectant.
product_subtype.title: Product Subtype

aerosolCarrierFamily.description: Optional explicit aerosol carrier family such as hydrocarbon_propellant_solvent or water_ethanol_propellant when formulation-level spray semantics are known.
aerosolCarrierFamily.title: Aerosolcarrierfamily

aerosolFormulationProfile.description: Optional explicit aerosol formulation profile such as anhydrous_ethanol_propellant, water_quat_propellant, or high_solids_polymer_propellant when formulation-specific spray semantics are known.
aerosolFormulationProfile.title: Aerosolformulationprofile

physical_form.description: Physical form such as cream, liquid, spray, or gel.
physical_form.title: Physical Form

application_method.description: How the product is applied, for example hand_application or trigger_spray.
application_method.title: Application Method

retention_type.description: Retention class such as leave_on or rinse_off.
retention_type.title: Retention Type

concentration_fraction.description: Fraction of the target chemical in the product, 0-1.
concentration_fraction.title: Concentration Fraction

use_amount_unit.description: Unit for the use amount per event.

use_events_per_day.description: Number of product-use events per day.
use_events_per_day.title: Use Events Per Day

density_g_per_ml.description: Density when the product amount is in mL.
density_g_per_ml.title: Density G Per Ml

particleMaterialContext.description: Optional particle or nanomaterial context carried with the use profile.

ingestion_fraction.description: Fraction of chemical mass incidentally or directly ingested.
ingestion_fraction.title: Ingestion Fraction

aerosolized_fraction.description: Fraction of chemical mass released to air.
aerosolized_fraction.title: Aerosolized Fraction

room_volume_m3.description: Indoor room volume for inhalation screening.
room_volume_m3.title: Room Volume M3

air_exchange_rate_per_hour.description: Air exchange rate for inhalation screening.
air_exchange_rate_per_hour.title: Air Exchange Rate Per Hour

defaults_hash_sha256.description: Hash for the defaults pack in use.
defaults_hash_sha256.title: Defaults Hash Sha256

value.description: Numeric value for the dose metric.
value.title: Value

tier_claimed.description: Tier family implemented by the active model.

tier_earned.description: Tier earned after the current checks and defaults.

tier_rationale.description: Short rationale for the current tier assignment.
tier_rationale.title: Tier Rationale

assumption_checks_passed.description: Whether the minimum checks for the earned tier passed.
assumption_checks_passed.title: Assumption Checks Passed

required_caveats.description: Caveats that should stay attached to interpretation of the result.
required_caveats.title: Required Caveats

forbidden_interpretations.description: Interpretations that the result must not support at the current tier.
forbidden_interpretations.title: Forbidden Interpretations

route.description: Route for which the tier upgrade applies.

rationale.description: Why the upgrade is recommended or blocked.
rationale.title: Rationale

description.description: What the future field is expected to capture.
description.title: Description

reason.description: Why the field matters for the requested tier.
reason.title: Reason

scenario.description: Source external exposure scenario to map into PBPK MCP import fields.

context_of_use.description: Downstream orchestration context such as screening-brief.
context_of_use.title: Context Of Use

scientific_purpose.default: external exposure scenario translation for PBPK
scientific_purpose.description: Human-readable scientific purpose for the PBPK-side context object.
scientific_purpose.title: Scientific Purpose

decision_context.description: Decision-context text to preserve PBPK boundary semantics.
decision_context.title: Decision Context

requested_output.description: Optional target output label to prefill PBPK assessment-context metadata.
requested_output.title: Requested Output

comparison_metric.description: PBPK comparison metric for the downstream BER-input placeholder.
comparison_metric.title: Comparison Metric

source_platform.description: Source platform name written into the PBPK import request.
source_platform.title: Source Platform

source_version.description: Source platform version written into the PBPK import request.
source_version.title: Source Version

model_name.description: Optional model name for the PBPK-side import record.
model_name.title: Model Name

operator.description: Optional operator name for downstream auditability.
operator.title: Operator

sponsor.description: Optional sponsor name for downstream auditability.
sponsor.title: Sponsor
